pages.text:
MINISTER OF FOREIGN AFFAIRS

REPUBLIC OF MALDIVES

WHEREAS the Convention on International Exhibition was adopted at Paris on the Twenty Second Day of November, One Thousand Nine Hundred and Twenty Eight;

WHEREAS the Republic of Maldives is entitled to become party to the above mentioned Convention by virtue of Article 35 thereof;

WHEREAS the Republic of Maldives desires to accede to the above mentioned Convention; and

IN WITNESS WHEREOF, I, ABDULLA SHAHID, Minister of Foreign

Affairs of the Republic of Maldives, have signed this Instrument of Accession and affixed my seal.

DONE, at Male', this Twenty Fourth Day of Shawwal, One Thousand Four

Hundred and Twenty Eight of the Hijri Calendar, corresponding to the Fourth Day of

November, Two Thousand and Seven.

Patella and

Abdulla Shahid
